# Example Prompts

- Create a Filament 5 admin-only `canAccessPanel()` implementation for an existing User model.
- Review this Filament 5 PanelProvider authentication setup against the Users docs.
- Add Filament 5 profile editing with a custom `username` field using only documented APIs.
- Configure Filament 5 user display names and avatars from documented contracts.
- Enable Filament 5 app-based MFA with recovery codes and list the required model/migration changes.
- Set up Filament 5 tenant access for users who belong to many teams.
- Review this tenant-aware Filament Resource for documented tenancy scoping risks.
- Add tenant registration, tenant profile, and tenant menu customization using Context7-confirmed Filament 5 APIs.
